# terrible_community_general_scaleway_security_group_rule (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Rule action.
- `direction` (String) Rule direction.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `port` (Number) Port related to the rule, null value for all the ports.
- `protocol` (String) Network protocol to use.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `par1`).
- `security_group` (String) Security Group unique identifier.

### Optional

- `ip_range` (String) IPV4 CIDR notation to apply to the rule.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the Security Group Rule.

### Read-Only

- `data` (String) This is only present when `state=present`.
